name: hosthunter
title: hosthunter
summary: tool to discover and extract hostnames providing a set of target IP addresses
description:
tool to discover and extract hostnames providing a set of target IP addresses
This package contains a tool to efficiently discover and extract hostnames
providing a large set of target IP addresses. HostHunter utilises simple OSINT
techniques to map IP addresses with virtual hostnames. It generates a CSV or
TXT file containing the results of the reconnaissance.
.
Latest version of HostHunter also takes screenshots of the targets, it is
currently a beta functionality.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use hosthunter because tool to discover and extract hostnames providing a set of target IP addresses.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use hosthunter as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `hosthunter [options] [args]` as documented upstream for hosthunter.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair hosthunter with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `hosthunter --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
